params.name: My Only Desire
params.description: A 15th-century French tapestry, considered the "Medieval Mona Lisa," housed in the Musée de Cluny in Paris. It features a lady and a unicorn, symbolizing chastity and the rejection of sensual temptation. The intricate craftsmanship and rich symbolism make it a French national treasure.
